caption: A man with short dark hair is speaking on a stage against a dark background illuminated by purple diagonal light beams. He is wearing a grey blazer over a light blue button-down shirt and a dark undershirt, with a thin headset microphone curving around his cheek. He gestures with both hands as he speaks, moving them outward and slightly upward to emphasize his points. In the first instance, his hands are held low and open. He then shifts his right hand upward and forward, gesturing toward an unseen audience. He returns to a wider gesture with both hands spread, and finally, his hands lower slightly as he continues talking. The camera remains in a medium shot, focusing on his upper body and facial expressions throughout the sequence. No text, logos, or other people are visible in the frames.
